findings.title: AWS access key committed in deploy/config.yaml
findings.description: Hardcoded long-lived AWS key AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE found in deploy/config.yaml on the main branch

findings.title: IAM role reachable by a leaked key has AdministratorAccess over customer-PII backups
findings.description: The role assumed via access key AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE holds AdministratorAccess, including s3:GetObject on the customer-pii backup bucket

findings.title: CVE in a build-time dependency
findings.description: libbuildtool 1.2 has CVE-2023-0001; used only by a local codegen script, not shipped at runtime

findings.title: Missing security headers
findings.description: CSP and X-Content-Type-Options are not set on the app root

findings.title: S3 bucket acme-cdn is public
findings.description: Bucket acme-cdn is world-readable; it holds only public static web assets (css/js/images)

findings.title: Slack webhook URL in README
findings.description: A Slack incoming-webhook URL is present in the README; it posts to a public #announcements channel

findings.title: Server version disclosed
findings.description: The Server response header discloses the reverse-proxy version
